creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, no it is not ok, because it doesn't track required dependencies, that were introduced in 2.0.2. Anyway, I already have both nbxmpp and gajim updates ready, just need to check them in poudriere. Right now rust build stops me from that (build fails on my machine because of lack of memory or something). 

Just give my some more time.
